title: ActionManifest
description: Predeclaration of a proposed side effect or observation. final.md section 12.3. Risk class can be raised by policy, never lowered by the agent. Unknown side effects require denial or review.

expected_side_effects.description: Declared side-effect classes. A side effect observed at runtime that is not in this list must be denied or escalated.

required_grants.description: Grant ids that must ALL admit this action (conjunctive).

idempotency_key.description: Stable key so retries do not double-apply external effects.

compensation_plan.description: How to undo/compensate this action if it must be rolled back, or null if the action is read-only / non-compensable and that has been acknowledged.
